theme_archetype.description: Professional, corporate, grounding, organic B2B SaaS. Conveys trust, sustainability, and technical precision without feeling clinical.

rules: Terminal logs use variable opacity of light gray instead of saturated colors to prevent visual vibration.
Do not center-align body text; stick to left-alignment for dense B2B SaaS data.
Use bold/heavy weights sparingly, primarily for KPIs or critical states.

layout_and_spacing.structure: Fixed left sidebar (w-64 or w-72) + flex-1 content dashboard pane.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Tight density but clear hierarchy.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid #E2E8F0. No soft floating shadows; use structural outlines or extremely subtle shadow-sm. Subtle roundness, max 8px border-radius. Avoid overly round web3-style buttons.

sidebar.style: bg-[#FFFFFF] border-r border-slate-200. Clean list items with left-aligned icons.

kpi_cards.style: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col justify-between

inventory_table.header_style: bg-slate-50 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-[#475569] p-4 border-b border-slate-200

carbon_score_badge.style: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

live_agent_terminal.container: bg-[#0F172A] rounded-lg border border-slate-800 p-4 h-64 overflow-y-auto font-mono text-xs shadow-inner
live_agent_terminal.log_line: flex gap-3 mb-2 border-b border-slate-800/50 pb-2 last:border-0

buttons.primary: bg-[#15803D] hover:bg-[#365314] text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors border border-transparent
buttons.secondary: bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-[#1E293B] border border-slate-300 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-[#B45309] hover:bg-[#92400E] text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Weight: 'regular' or 'duotone' for active states. Consistent stroke width.

images.description: Professional headshot for the admin user profile
Abstract green leaf serving as the EcoSync AI logo

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based format (e.g., data-testid='approve-order-button', data-testid='terminal-log-list').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against the canvas and terminal backgrounds meets WCAG AA standards. Hover states must be distinctly visible.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono via Google Fonts.
Implement Recharts for the cumulative carbon tons saved metric. Use #15803D as the primary line/area color.
Ensure Shadcn UI components (if used) are heavily customized to override the default 'Vercel' look, specifically applying the exact color palette and max 8px border-radius.
The Terminal Window MUST auto-scroll to the bottom as new logs arrive.
Ensure the layout strictly adheres to the fixed left sidebar and scrolling content pane paradigm.
